name: InfuseAI
description: Taiwan-based MLOps platform PrimeHub — Kubernetes-based environment for training, deploying and monitoring models.

seo.title: InfuseAI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: InfuseAI: Taiwan-based MLOps platform PrimeHub — Kubernetes-based environment for training, deploying and monitoring models.

when_to_use: Managing ML experiment tracking and model registry on Kubernetes
Deploying Jupyter-based ML workflows for distributed teams
Building reproducible ML pipelines with a hosted MLOps layer
Running GPU workloads on hybrid on-premise/cloud infrastructure

pros: Good fit for teams already standardized on K8s
cons: Smaller community than Kubeflow or MLflow
Less polished than commercial SaaS MLOps
review.verdict: Reasonable self-hosted MLOps if you already run Kubernetes and want data control.
review.best_for: APAC enterprises running ML on-prem with Kubernetes expertise
review.not_for: Small teams wanting managed SaaS MLOps without DevOps overhead

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
